claim: WHO estimates 10-20 percent of women in LMICs experience perinatal depression, with detection below 10 percent, treatment near zero, and significant child-development consequences.

source.title: WHO Guide for Integration of Perinatal Mental Health in Maternal and Child Health Services

method: Reviewed WHO guide, prevalence estimates, and integration framework.
limitations: Prevalence estimates depend on screening instrument and population.
Detection data is sparse outside research settings.
